name: TopGreen Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: TopGreen Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various cutting tools in Taiwan and internationally. Its products comprise composite rods, mechanical cutting tools, micro cutting tools, tapping tools, PCB tools, medical tools, diamond tools, aircraft cutting tools, special molding tools, blanks, custom tools, precision punch tools, etc. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
